node_6.subject: Hailey Johnson
node_6.description: This is Hailey Johnson's plan for Friday February 13: wake up and complete the morning routine at 8:00 am, wake up and complete the morning routine at 10:00 am, have brunch at 11:00 am, dedicate time to writing the novel from 12:00 pm to 3:00 pm, take a creative break and explore a few new cultures or literature sources from 3:00 pm to 4:30 pm, work on podcast planning from 4:30 pm to 6:00 pm, have dinner at 6:00 pm, relax and unwind with some light reading or watching TV from 7:00 pm to 9:00 pm.
